T0003.title: Bulk Arbitrage Flip
T0003.definition: In e-commerce fraud, 'big scalp' refers to an arbitrage tactic where individuals exploit steep discounts or price gaps to purchase goods in bulk and resell them for profit, typically during promotional events.
